subject: Re:
body:

----- Original Message ----
From: Fabi! <fabiehle@yahoo.com.br>
To: Jeffrey Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Monday, December 11, 2006 9:08:36 AM
Subject: 

Hey you!!
  I was talking about you to a friend today, now I miss you soooo much!!!
  ehhehe
  How are u??
   
  I still in Taipei, I'm going home in feb, after I'll come back here or Hong Kong,Thailand...actually, I don't know yet! 
   
  Ha!! If you go LA, you can see around there, huge campaing...heheheh
   
  This one is for a campaing that I did here, hope u like it!!
  Kiiiiisses!!
